name: Cinnamon-Apple-Apricot Cake for Passover
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss apples with sugar and cinnamon. Set apples and apricots aside.
2. In a bowl, combine egg yolks, sugar, vanilla, lemon zest, matzoh meal, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff and glossy. Loosen batter with a generous dollop of egg whites, then fold in remaining egg whites into the batter.
4. Spoon half of the batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan. Arrange apples on top. Dot with minced apricot and cover with remaining batter. Batter will be thick and sticky; don't worry about spreading it evenly.
5. Combine topping ingredients (1/3 cup walnuts, finely chopped, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon sugar) and sprinkle over cake batter.
6. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Makes 8 to 10 portions.
